summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue proposes automating the release process for the Plone package using `tox`. The goal is to utilize GitHub Actions to generate package archives and publish them to PyPI securely.

## What needs to be done
1. Set up GitHub Actions to:
   - Generate `sdist` and `wheel` archives using the [build-and-inspect-python-package](https://github.com/hynek/build-and-inspect-python-package) action.
   - Use the [gh-action-pypi-publish](https://github.com/pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish) for publishing the archives to PyPI.
2. Integrate the "trusted publishing" feature on PyPI to keep credentials secure.
3. Implement a pre-action to update the change log via `towncrier`.
4. Implement a post-action to update `versions.cfg` and `checkouts.cfg`.

## Helpful background
While the issue has a clear foundational plan, the pre- and post-actions may need further detail. The discussion also hints at potential triggers for the release workflow but lacks definitive consensus on the overall execution.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the mentioned GitHub Actions and how `tox` integrates with the Plone setup.
2. Explore the `towncrier` tool for updating change logs.
3. Review the "trusted publishers" feature on PyPI to understand its benefits.
4. Consider discussing the issue further to clarify any uncertainties around implementation.
